Claude is now available in Europe

Jay Kreps appointed to Anthropic's Board of Directors

Salesforce teams up with Anthropic to enhance Einstein capabilities with Claude

U.S. Elections Readiness
Announcing our updated Responsible Scaling Policy
Introducing computer use, a new Claude 3.5 Sonnet, and Claude 3.5 Haiku
Developing a computer use model
Claude 3.5 Sonnet on GitHub Copilot
Raising the bar on SWE-bench Verified with Claude 3.5 Sonnet
The case for targeted regulation
Powering the next generation of AI development with AWS
Introducing the Model Context Protocol
Elections and AI in 2024: observations and learnings
Alignment faking in large language models
item.description: This paper provides the first empirical example of a model engaging in alignment faking without being trained to do so—selectively complying with training objectives while strategically preserving existing preferences.

item.title: Anthropic achieves ISO 42001 certification for responsible AI
Lyft to bring Claude to more than 40 million riders and over 1 million drivers
The Anthropic Economic Index
item.description: The Anthropic Economic Index analyzes millions of Claude.ai conversations showing AI usage concentrated in software development and technical writing, touching 25%+ of tasks in 36% of occupations. AI leans toward augmentation (57%) over automation (43%).

item.title: Statement from Dario Amodei on the Paris AI Action Summit
Anthropic signs MOU with UK Government to explore how AI can transform UK public services
Claude’s extended thinking
Claude 3.7 Sonnet and Claude Code
Claude and Alexa+
Introducing Anthropic's Transparency Hub
Anthropic partners with U.S. National Labs for first 1,000 Scientist AI Jam
Anthropic raises Series E at $61.5B post-money valuation
Anthropic’s recommendations to OSTP for the U.S. AI action plan
Progress from our Frontier Red Team
Anthropic’s response to Governor Newsom’s AI working group draft report
Tracing the thoughts of a large language model
item.description: Circuit tracing lets us watch Claude think, uncovering a shared conceptual space where reasoning happens before being translated into language—suggesting the model can learn something in one language and apply it in another.

item.title: Anthropic Economic Index: Insights from Claude 3.7 Sonnet
item.description: Increased Claude 3.7 Sonnet usage for coding, education, and science since launch. Extended thinking mode favors technical tasks. New datasets reveal automation patterns across 630 granular usage categories.

item.title: Introducing Claude for Education
Introducing Anthropic's first developer conference: Code with Claude
Anthropic appoints Guillaume Princen as Head of EMEA and announces 100+ new roles across the region
Anthropic Education Report: How university students use Claude
Our approach to understanding and addressing AI harms
Detecting and countering malicious uses of Claude: March 2025
Anthropic Economic Index: AI’s impact on software development
item.description: Comparing Claude Code to Claude.ai reveals stark differences in how developers work with AI. The coding agent shows 79% automation versus 49% on Claude.ai, web development dominates usage, and startups are adopting agentic tools far faster than enterprises—patterns that may preview how AI transforms other occupations.

item.title: Introducing the Anthropic Economic Advisory Council
Securing America's compute advantage: Anthropic’s position on the diffusion rule
Introducing Anthropic's AI for Science Program
Testing our safety defenses with a new bug bounty program
Introducing Claude 4
Activating AI Safety Level 3 protections
Reed Hastings appointed to Anthropic’s board of directors
Claude Gov models for U.S. national security customers
National security expert Richard Fontaine appointed to Anthropic’s long-term benefit trust
Claude in Amazon Bedrock: Approved for use in FedRAMP High and DoD IL4/5 workloads
How people use Claude for support, advice, and companionship
Introducing the Anthropic Economic Futures Program
The need for transparency in Frontier AI
Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory expands Claude for Enterprise use to empower scientists and researchers
Advancing Claude for Education
Anthropic and the Department of Defense to advance responsible AI in defense operations
Investing in energy to secure America's AI future
Claude for Financial Services
item.description: Helping finance professionals analyze markets, conduct research, and make investment decisions.

item.title: Paul Smith to join Anthropic as Chief Commercial Officer
Anthropic to sign the EU Code of Practice
Build AI in America
Anthropic partners with the University of Chicago’s Becker Friedman Institute on AI economic research
Thoughts on America’s AI Action Plan
item.description: Anthropic's response to the White House AI Action Plan supports infrastructure and safety measures while calling for stronger export controls and transparency requirements to maintain American AI leadership.

item.title: Anthropic Signs CMS Health Tech Ecosystem Pledge to Advance Healthcare Interoperability
Our framework for developing safe and trustworthy agents
Federal government departments and agencies can now purchase Claude through the GSA schedule
Claude Opus 4.1
item.description: Our most powerful model for handling complex agent and coding tasks

item.title: Anthropic appoints Hidetoshi Tojo as Head of Japan and announces hiring plans
Offering expanded Claude access across all three branches of the U.S. government
Building safeguards for Claude
Usage policy update
item.description: Updates to our Usage Policy that reflect the growing capabilities and evolving usage of our products

item.title: Claude Code and new admin controls for business plans
Developing nuclear safeguards for AI through public-private partnership
item.description: Together with the NNSA and DOE national laboratories, we have co-developed a classifier—an AI system that automatically categorizes content—that distinguishes between concerning and benign nuclear-related conversations with 96% accuracy in preliminary testing.

item.title: Anthropic launches higher education advisory board and AI Fluency courses
Anthropic Education Report: How educators use Claude
Introducing the Anthropic National Security and Public Sector Advisory Council
item.description: We are announcing the formation of the Anthropic National Security and Public Sector Advisory Council, a group of leading bipartisan national security and public policy practitioners who will help Anthropic support the U.S. government and closely allied democracies in building and maintaining enduring technological advantages in an era of strategic competition.

item.title: Detecting and countering misuse of AI: August 2025
Updates to Consumer Terms and Privacy Policy
Anthropic raises $13B Series F at $183B post-money valuation
item.description: Anthropic raised $13 billion in a Series F round at a $183 billion valuation to expand enterprise offerings, safety research, and international growth as revenue grew from $1 billion to over $5 billion in eight months.

item.title: Anthropic Signs White House Pledge to America's Youth: Investing in AI Education
Updating restrictions of sales to unsupported regions
item.description: To account for this reality and better align with our commitment to ensuring that transformative AI capabilities advance democratic interests, we are strengthening our regional restrictions.

item.title: Anthropic is endorsing SB 53
item.description: Anthropic is endorsing SB 53, the California bill that governs powerful AI systems built by frontier AI developers like Anthropic.

item.title: Strengthening our safeguards through collaboration with US CAISI and UK AISI
item.description: Over the past year, we've collaborated with the US Center for AI Standards and Innovation (CAISI) and UK AI Security Institute (AISI), government bodies established to measure and improve the security of AI systems.

item.title: Anthropic Economic Index: Tracking AI’s role in the US and global economy
item.description: This report maps how Claude is used differently across US states and countries, finding strong correlations between income and AI adoption. It also tracks a notable shift: directive automation has risen from 27% to 39% of conversations since December 2024, with businesses automating far more than consumers.

item.title: Anthropic Economic Index report: Uneven geographic and enterprise AI adoption
item.description: Claude usage has shifted toward educational and scientific tasks with users delegating complete work rather than collaborating. AI adoption concentrates in wealthy regions, with first-time analysis of enterprise API patterns.

item.title: Claude is now generally available in Xcode
Anthropic expands global leadership in enterprise AI, naming Chris Ciauri as Managing Director of International
item.description: Chris Ciauri joins Anthropic as Managing Director of International, adding to our global leadership team as we expand our worldwide presence.

item.title: Introducing Claude Sonnet 4.5
item.description: Claude Sonnet 4.5 sets new benchmark records in coding, reasoning, and computer use while being Anthropic's most aligned model, accompanied by the release of the Claude Agent SDK for building capable agents

item.title: Enabling Claude Code to work more autonomously
Building AI for cyber defenders
Deloitte will make Claude available to 470,000 people across its global network
Rahul Patil joins Anthropic as Chief Technology Officer
Expanding our global operations to India with our second Asia Pacific office
item.description: We’re expanding our global operations to India, with plans to open an office in Bengaluru in early 2026.

item.title: Anthropic and Salesforce expand partnership to bring Claude to regulated industries
Introducing Claude Haiku 4.5
item.description: Claude Haiku 4.5 matches state-of-the-art coding capabilities from months ago while delivering unprecedented speed and cost-efficiency for complex tasks.

item.title: Claude for Life Sciences
item.description: Introducing Claude for Life Sciences, a series of improvements to make Claude a better partner for researchers, clinical coordinators, and others who work in life sciences.

item.title: A statement from Dario Amodei on Anthropic's commitment to American AI leadership
item.description: A statement from Anthropic CEO, Dario Amodei, on Anthropic’s commitment to advancing America's leadership in building powerful and beneficial AI.

item.title: Expanding our use of Google Cloud TPUs and Services
Seoul becomes Anthropic’s third office in Asia-Pacific as we continue our international growth
Advancing Claude for Financial Services
item.description: Claude for Financial Services now supports a native Excel plug-in, new connectors to real-time market, and pre-built skills for modeling, comp analysis, and earnings reports.

item.title: Anthropic officially opens Tokyo office, signs Memorandum of Cooperation with the Japan AI Safety Institute
Cognizant will make Claude available to 350,000 employees, accelerating enterprise AI adoption and internal transformation
Anthropic and Iceland announce one of the world’s first national AI education pilots
Launching the Anthropic Economic Futures Programme in the UK and Europe
New offices in Paris and Munich expand Anthropic’s European presence
Anthropic invests $50 billion in American AI infrastructure
Measuring political bias in Claude
The state of Maryland partners with Anthropic to better serve residents
Disrupting the first reported AI-orchestrated cyber espionage campaign
Anthropic partners with Rwandan Government and ALX to bring AI education to hundreds of thousands of learners across Africa
Microsoft, NVIDIA, and Anthropic announce strategic partnerships
item.description: Microsoft, NVIDIA and Anthropic announced new strategic partnerships. Anthropic is scaling its rapidly-growing Claude AI model on Microsoft Azure, powered by NVIDIA, which will broaden access to Claude and provide Azure enterprise customers with expanded model choice and new capabilities. Anthropic has committed to purchase $30 billion of Azure compute capacity and to contract additional compute capacity up to one gigawatt.

item.title: Claude now available in Microsoft Foundry and Microsoft 365 Copilot
Introducing Claude Opus 4.5
item.description: The best model in the world for coding, agents, and computer use, with meaningful improvements to everyday tasks like slides and spreadsheets. Claude Opus 4.5 delivers frontier performance and dramatically improved token efficiency.

item.title: Claude for Nonprofits
item.description: Anthropic launches Claude for Nonprofits to help organizations maximize their impact, featuring free AI training and discounted rates.

item.title: Anthropic acquires Bun as Claude Code reaches $1B milestone
Snowflake and Anthropic announce $200 million partnership to bring agentic AI to global enterprises
Accenture and Anthropic launch multi-year partnership to move enterprises from AI pilots to production
Donating the Model Context Protocol and establishing the Agentic AI Foundation
Protecting the wellbeing of our users
Working with the US Department of Energy to unlock the next era of scientific discovery
Sharing our compliance framework for California's Transparency in Frontier AI Act
Advancing Claude in healthcare and the life sciences
item.description: Claude for Healthcare introduces HIPAA-ready infrastructure for providers and payers, while expanded Life Sciences capabilities add connectors to Medidata and ClinicalTrials.gov for clinical trial operations and regulatory work.

item.title: Introducing Labs
Anthropic Economic Index report: Economic primitives
item.description: This report introduces new metrics of AI usage to provide a rich portrait of interactions with Claude in November 2025, just prior to the release of Opus 4.5.

item.title: Anthropic Economic Index: New building blocks for understanding AI use
How scientists are using Claude to accelerate research and discovery
Anthropic appoints Irina Ghose as Managing Director of India ahead of Bengaluru office opening
Anthropic and Teach For All launch global AI training initiative for educators
Mariano-Florentino Cuéllar appointed to Anthropic’s Long-Term Benefit Trust
Claude's new constitution
Anthropic partners with the UK Government to bring AI assistance to GOV.UK services
ServiceNow chooses Claude to power customer apps and increase internal productivity
Anthropic partners with Allen Institute and Howard Hughes Medical Institute to accelerate scientific discovery
Apple’s Xcode now supports the Claude Agent SDK
Claude is a space to think
item.description: We’ve made a choice: Claude will remain ad-free. We explain why advertising incentives are incompatible with a genuinely helpful AI assistant, and how we plan to expand access without compromising user trust.

item.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.6
item.description: We’re upgrading our smartest model. Across agentic coding, computer use, tool use, search, and finance, Opus 4.6 is an industry-leading model, often by wide margin.

item.title: Covering electricity price increases from our data centers
Anthropic is donating $20 million to Public First Action
Anthropic raises $30 billion in Series G funding at $380 billion post-money valuation
item.description: We have raised $30 billion in Series G funding led by GIC and Coatue, valuing Anthropic at $380 billion post-money. The investment will fuel the frontier research, product development, and infrastructure expansions that have made Anthropic the market leader in enterprise AI and coding. Our run-rate revenue is $14 billion, with this figure growing over 10x annually in each of those past three years.

item.title: Chris Liddell appointed to Anthropic’s board of directors
Anthropic partners with CodePath to bring Claude to the US’s largest collegiate computer science program
Anthropic opens Bengaluru office and announces new partnerships across India
Anthropic and Infosys collaborate to build AI agents for telecommunications and other regulated industries
Introducing Claude Sonnet 4.6
item.description: Sonnet 4.6 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale.

item.title: Anthropic and the Government of Rwanda sign MOU for AI in health and education
Making frontier cybersecurity capabilities available to defenders
item.description: Claude Code Security, a new capability built into Claude Code on the web, is now available in a limited research preview. It scans codebases for security vulnerabilities and suggests targeted software patches for human review, allowing teams to find and fix security issues that traditional methods often miss.

item.title: Detecting and preventing distillation attacks
Anthropic’s Responsible Scaling Policy: Version 3.0
Anthropic acquires Vercept to advance Claude's computer use capabilities
Statement from Dario Amodei on our discussions with the Department of War
item.description: A statement from our CEO on national security uses of AI.

item.title: Statement on the comments from Secretary of War Pete Hegseth
item.description: Anthropic's response to the Secretary of War and advice to customers.

item.title: Where things stand with the Department of War
item.description: A statement from Dario Amodei.

item.title: Partnering with Mozilla to improve Firefox’s security
Sydney will become Anthropic’s fourth office in Asia-Pacific
Introducing The Anthropic Institute
item.description: We’re launching The Anthropic Institute, a new effort to confront the most significant challenges that powerful AI will pose to our societies.

item.title: Anthropic invests $100 million into the Claude Partner Network
item.description: We’re launching the Claude Partner Network, a program for partner organizations helping enterprises adopt Claude.

item.title: What 81,000 people want from AI
item.description: We invited Claude.ai users to share how they use AI, what they dream it could make possible, and what they fear it might do. Nearly 81,000 people participated—the largest and most multilingual qualitative study of its kind. Here's what we found.

item.title: Australian government and Anthropic sign MOU for AI safety and research
Anthropic expands partnership with Google and Broadcom for multiple gigawatts of next-generation compute
Project Glasswing
item.description: A new initiative that brings together Amazon Web Services, Anthropic, Apple, Broadcom, Cisco, CrowdStrike, Google, JPMorganChase, the Linux Foundation, Microsoft, NVIDIA, and Palo Alto Networks in an effort to secure the world's most critical software.

item.title: Anthropic’s Long-Term Benefit Trust appoints Vas Narasimhan to Board of Directors
Introducing Claude Opus 4.7
item.description: Our latest Opus model brings stronger performance across coding, agents, vision, and multi-step tasks, with greater thoroughness and consistency on the work that matters most.

item.title: Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs
item.description: Today, we’re launching Claude Design, a new Anthropic Labs product that lets you collaborate with Claude to create polished visual work like designs, prototypes, slides, one-pagers, and more.
